message:
Fix missing stats, routes, and add operator counts

- App.tsx: Add missing /pods route (was redirecting to home)
- Deployments.tsx: Add missing stat cases for 'deployments', 'pod_issues',
  'deployment_issues' - these were showing 0
- GitOps.tsx: Use useOperatorSubscriptions for operators count instead of
  hardcoded 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
